title: Preparation of M9 Salts
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ibwcape

steps.title: Add 1 L dH 2 O...
steps.instruction: Add 1 L dH 2 O to a clean media bottle

steps.title: Add 64 g Na 2 HPO...
steps.instruction: Add 64 g Na 2 HPO 4 -7H 2 O Disodium hydrogen phosphate Contributed by users

steps.title: Add 15 g KH 2 PO...
steps.instruction: Add 15 g KH 2 PO 4 Potassium phosphate (monobasic) P212121

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.5 g NaCl Sodium Chloride Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID:5234

steps.title: Add 5 g NH 4 Cl Ammonium Chloride P212121
steps.instruction: Add 5 g NH 4 Cl Ammonium Chloride P212121
